fieldsetPhoneDescription: The phone number displayed in the listing is always the same as the number added to and verified on the account and cannot be edited while creating a listing. To use a different phone number, you must add and verify a new number on your account. This approach helps prevent fraud, impersonation, and other forms of abuse.
information: Each listing is created for a period of 1 month. After that time, it must be renewed to remain active. Renewal becomes available only when less than 30 days remain until the listing’s expiration.
title: New listing
